arts.sum: Brentford have been mentioned as a potential suitor for Genoa midfielder Morten Frendrup over the past few months. In October, the Bees were presented as the favourites to land the Dane. arts.ttl: ‘Sudden and radical’ turn of events sees efforts to sign Newcastle United player within weeks
arts.sum: Last week, it was reported in Italy that Sandro Tonali could leave Newcastle United as something had broken in the relationship between the club and the midfielder. The Italian international’s agent Giuseppe Riso later insisted the player isn’t pushing to leave Newcastle United, and attempted to quell the rumours. The talk about Tonali hasn’t died The post ‘Sudden and radical’ turn of events sees efforts to sign Newcastle United player within weeks appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United present offer for January signing – Magpies moving concretely, need higher fee
arts.sum: Newcastle United are in the picture to sign Real Valladolid’s Juma Bah in the winter market. That’s according to Sportitalia, and they make it clear this is their own information about Newcastle. Real Valladolid took the 18-year-old on loan from Sierra Leone’s AIK Freetong in the summer. arts.ttl: I told Newcastle United players to put 'friendships aside' during watershed team meeting
arts.sum: Bruno said: "We've spoken a lot as a team after the Brentford game. That is part of football and we will always do what is best for the club and the team because the most important thing is Newcastle United and being in the position to play our best football."
